prompt:
Create a square 2x2 premium advertising concept board with four distinct realistic yet surreal product ads, each product centered as the hero and visually formed from materials that express the brand identity.

Top left: a Fanta orange soda bottle and glass in a sunlit orange grove. Build the logo area from sliced oranges and leaves above the product, with an orange soda splash spiraling down around the bottle. Use warm golden-hour lighting, juicy citrus texture, precise shadows, and the slogan "BOLD ORANGE REFRESH" at the bottom.

Top right: a KFC fried chicken ad inside a polished fryer basket on a clean counter. Show crispy chicken pieces popping upward with oil droplets, while a glowing steam outline forms a KFC bucket and logo above. Use red, cream, and stainless-steel tones, cinematic restaurant lighting, and the slogan "CRUNCH. DANCE. REPEAT." at the bottom.

Bottom left: a Shell Super Plus motor oil bottle as a powerful mechanical hero object. Wrap the bottle with a futuristic chrome robotic arm and engine components, plus a glowing outline of a flexing arm behind it. Use red and yellow brand colors, glossy oil material, high-end studio reflections, and the slogan "UNLEASH YOUR POWER" at the bottom.

Bottom right: a Red Bull energy drink can on a pedestal at dusk with runners blurred in the background. Add luminous red and blue energy trails and transparent neon wings extending from the can. Use cool cinematic sports lighting, a premium night-road atmosphere, and the slogan "VITALIZE YOUR STRIDE" at the bottom.

Keep every quadrant ultra-realistic, editorial, luxury commercial style, perfectly balanced framing, clean typography, official-looking logo placement, cohesive lighting, strong realism, no extra text beyond each logo and its short slogan.
